content.headline: Ship high-performance sites in minutes
content.subheadline: Schema-first generation maps every block to battle-tested UI components with zero layout drift.
content.sectionClassName: mx-auto flex max-w-3xl flex-col items-center gap-6 px-4 py-20 text-center

items.title: Structured output
items.description: Every page is validated against a strict Zod schema before it reaches the renderer.

items.title: Component mapping
items.description: Layout blocks resolve directly to Server Components with minimal client JavaScript.

items.title: Theme tokens
items.description: Colors and typography flow from JSON tokens into Tailwind-friendly presentation.

content.heading: What teams are saying

items.quote: We cut landing-page build time from days to under an hour without sacrificing Lighthouse scores.
items.author: Jordan Lee

items.quote: The block schema keeps our AI output predictable — no more broken layouts in production.
items.author: Priya Shah

items.quote: Publishing to Vercel is one click. The JSON-to-HTML pipeline just works.
items.author: Marcus Chen

content.gridClassName: mx-auto grid max-w-5xl gap-6 px-4 lg:grid-cols-3

items.question: How does the layout schema work?
items.answer: Each block has a type and a strongly typed content object. The render engine maps types to React components.

items.question: Can I customize theme tokens?
items.answer: Yes. Set primary, secondary, background, and text colors plus a fontFamily stack in the theme object.

items.question: Is the output optimized for performance?
items.answer: Blocks favor Server Components, semantic HTML, and Tailwind utility classes for lean bundles.

content.headline: Ready to generate your next site?
content.subheadline: Paste a URL, get structured JSON, publish to the edge.
